jobs.note: ONE call only — 4 panels inside, then excalibur_blog_cover_quad_split.py

mcp_args.prompt:
Russian human-made hook collage, zine/trash-design DIY aesthetic adapted to 16:9 widescreen, torn paper strips, scotch tape, pink sticky notes, marker handwriting, highlighter pink brush on key Cyrillic words, fake phone screenshots (Wordstat, reviews, Telegram chat, analytics), meme reaction cutouts with rough edges, grunge paper texture background #F5F5F0, bold condensed Cyrillic headlines, layered scraps NOT corporate banner,
Single canvas 2048x1152 pixels, exact 2x2 grid, four equal 16:9 panels (1024x576 each). Optional thin white gutters ONLY on the exact center lines (x=1024 and y=576); keep all panel content strictly inside its quadrant — no bleed across seams.
REFERENCE FACE (top-left cover ONLY): preserve EXACT likeness from input reference photo —
Blog host on COVER ONLY: preserve EXACT face likeness from reference — bright blue eyes, short dark brown hair, clean-shaven, no glasses. Skin: clean even tone, subtle professional retouch, natural studio lighting, no blemishes or harsh grain. Expression: warm friendly smile, approachable expert — NOT neutral serious portrait from reference. Pose reacts to article topic: point at key chart, graph, funnel, dashboard, table or highlighted number on the collage when it makes the hook clearer; eye contact with camera OR directed gaze at the UI element. Outfit, props: agent's creative choice for the meme hook — do NOT copy reference photo clothing unless scene_hint asks.
Свободный выбор агента: костюм, casual, мем-костюм, реквизит — по cover_hook и scene_hint. Reference photo outfit is NOT mandatory.
Top-left COVER — hook "SEO-текст, который люди дочитают — миф или workflow?":
16:9 hook collage panel: blog host cutout (reference face, agent-chosen outfit), layered fake screenshots (Wordstat keys, zero reads analytics, 5-star review snippet or Telegram «где трафик?»), torn paper + tape + pink sticky note, 1-2 different meme reaction faces, huge Cyrillic hook headline with pink highlight on key word, handwritten arrow, DIY human-made zine aesthetic NOT corporate ad
reference-лицо, редактор за ноутбуком с блокнотом, тёплый свет лампы, casual рубашка; вокруг fake Wordstat «15 000 ключей», analytics «0 прочтений», Telegram «где трафик?», стикер-отзыв ★☆☆☆☆, meme facepalm + shocked cat cutout, розовый highlight на «0 прочтений»
Cyrillic meme caption: "15k ключей — 0 прочтений?".
Different meme reactions than inline panels. Fake screenshots encouraged.
Top-right — [Сравнительная таблица / UI-мокап] Professional Russian blog editorial UI mockup, clean SaaS dashboard aesthetic, light background #FAFAF7, accent #E85D4C, readable Cyrillic labels, 16:9 widescreen screenshot style, H2: «Разберите, зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье». Таблица SEO vs GEO: критерии, цели, человек vs AI — «Разберите, зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье» looks like a helpful pasted screenshot with pink sticky note corner and scotch tape, human-made Notion/Google Sheets vibe, subtle shadow, high detail Cyrillic UI, no host face NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme impact font, cartoon mascot, watermark, English UI labels, blurry text
Bottom-left — [Схема workflow / шаги] Clean Russian infographic workflow diagram, numbered steps connected by arrows, editorial blog style, colors #FAFAF7 #1A1A2E #E85D4C #FFD93D, 16:9, H2: «Соберите структуру longread: от семантики до читабельности». 6 шагов longread: интент -> семантика -> outline -> lead -> факты -> FAQ — «Соберите структуру longread: от семантики до читабельности» readable Cyrillic step titles on torn-paper workflow strip, marker arrows, taped checklist scrap, practical how-to, no meme faces NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme, face closeup, watermark, chaotic collage, English text
Bottom-right — [FAQ + schema / JSON-LD UI] Russian SEO article UI mockup showing FAQ accordion block and JSON-LD schema panel side by side, developer-blog aesthetic, light theme, 16:9, H2: «Настройте schema и блок вопросов для сниппета и AI». FAQ accordion + JSON-LD schema UI — «Настройте schema и блок вопросов для сниппета и AI» Cyrillic FAQ + schema JSON panel as fake browser/devtools screenshot with sticky note «проверь FAQ», helpful not meme, no host face NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme, cartoon face, watermark, English-only UI
single canvas 2048x1152 pixels, exact 2x2 grid, four equal 16:9 panels (1024x576 each), thin white gutters, high detail collage illustration, each panel feels like a human editor pasted screenshots and memes
Inline panels (top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right): editorial UI/diagram only — NO host face on those three panels.
Negative: English text, Latin UI, watermark, logo, generic stock photo, boring corporate infographic, vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story, polished ad, same meme 4 times, unreadable gibberish text, extra fingers, vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story layout, corporate stock banner, clean minimal SaaS only, English text, watermark, same meme repeated 4 times, polished ad look, extra faces on inline panels
